mapper.sql:
a.id, a.login_name AS "loginName", a.login_pass AS "loginPass", a.login_count AS "loginCount", a.email, a.name, a.gender, a.mobile, a.address, a.zipcode,
a.enable_flag AS "enableFlag",
a.register_ip AS "registerIp", a.register_date AS "registerDate", a.last_login_ip AS "lastLoginIp", a.last_login_date AS "lastLoginDate",
a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_member a WHERE a.id IN #{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_member( id, email, login_pass, name, gender, mobile, address, zipcode, enable_flag, register_ip, register_date, last_login_ip, last_login_date, priority, remarks, create_date, update_date, ywtb_id, login_name, del_flag ) values ( #{id}, #{email, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, #{loginPass}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{mobile, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, #{address, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, #{zipcode}, #{enableFlag}, #{registerIp}, #{registerDate}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{lastLoginDate}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate}, #{ywtbId}, #{loginName}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, mobile = #{mobile, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, address = #{address, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, email = #{email, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_member SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, mobile = #{mobile, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, address = #{address, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
